ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race event */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the race is held */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., regatta, championship) */,
  "race_format" TEXT /* Format of the race (e.g., fleet racing, match racing) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "race_format_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the race format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the sailor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "sailing_club" TEXT /* Sailing club the sailor belongs to */,
  "sailing_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of sailing experience */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the sailor became a member of their sailing club */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the sailor */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the sailor has (for safety purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "boat_class" TEXT /* Class of the boat (e.g., Laser Int., Thistle) */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the boat */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of boat (e.g., one-design, handicap) */,
  "boat_length" TEXT /* Length of the boat in meters */,
  "boat_beam" TEXT /* Beam (width) of the boat in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_boat_class FOREIGN KEY ("boat_class") REFERENCES race_classes ("class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the sailor in the race */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the race (e.g., 30:17) */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the race (e.g., 0:38:44) */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the sailor during the race */,
  "average_speed" TEXT /* Average speed of the sailor during the race */,
  "ranking_points" TEXT /* Ranking points earned by the sailor in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone for the organizer */,
  "organizer_type" TEXT /* Type of organizer (e.g., sailing club, event management company) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, organizer, participant) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts since the last successful login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat class (e.g., Laser Int., Thistle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boat class */,
  "min_sailors" INTEGER /* Minimum number of sailors required for the class */,
  "max_sailors" INTEGER /* Maximum number of sailors allowed for the class */,
  "class_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the boat class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
